content: The intrinsic reward signals from curiosity-driven methods like ICM and RND can be repurposed as a dynamic quality filter to actively prune and prioritize noisy or redundant episodic memories in SOTA 2024–2025 active learning agents, rather than only driving exploration. This creates a self-sustaining memory loop where curiosity about under-learned states both expands an agent’s memory and curates it to keep only high-value experiences.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
